segments.text: India has thousands of universities but only one cracks the global top 100. The times higher education subject rankings
2026 are out. Despite our scale only one Indian institution makes the global top 100. IISC Bengaluru across 11 major
subjects. India misses the top tier everywhere else. Now compare MIT tops three subjects. The US leads eight of
11. The UK leads the rest and China 77 universities in the global top 100.
Peaking university enters the computer science top 10. Singh Hua breaks into the physical sciences top 10. Although we have quantity but rankings don't reward volume. They reward quality,
focus and innovation. What do you think India needs to do to lead in technology and innovation? Let me know in the comments.
